9. **Stage and commit** using `git add <plan-file-path>` + `git commit -m "..."`. Do NOT use `git add -A`. Preserve append-only `.hivemind/session-tracker/*`.

## PLAN.md STRUCTURE (required sections)

```markdown
# Phase 51: Synthesize Core Tmux Classes In-Tree — Plan

## Goal
[1 paragraph — what this phase delivers]

## Context
[Brief: in-scope, out-of-scope, locked decisions, sacred boundary contracts]

## Architecture
[3 target class diagrams in Mermaid: TmuxMultiplexer, SessionManager, GridPlanner + how integration.ts uses them]

## Tasks

### Wave 1: Foundation (sequential, depends on nothing)
- **T1.1** {class/types file} — {action} — atomic commit: "..." — EARS: REQ-51-01 — verify: `wc -l` shows expected LOC

### Wave 2: Class implementations (parallel, all depend on Wave 1)
- **T2.1** ... etc.

### Wave 3: Integration rewrite (sequential, depends on Wave 2)
- **T3.1** ...

### Wave 4: Fork removal (sequential, depends on Wave 3)
- **T4.1** `git rm src/features/tmux/fork-bridge.ts` + `git rm tests/lib/tmux/fork-bridge.test.ts` — verify: `git grep fork-bridge` returns 0

### Wave 5: BATS + vitest expansion (parallel, depends on Wave 4)
- **T5.1** 6 BATS files at `tests/scripts/tmux/{multiplexer,session,grid}/*.bats` (2 each) — verify: `npm test` shows 6/6 passing
- **T5.2** Expand vitest to 15+ across new classes (5+/class) — verify: `npm test` shows 15+ new passing

## EARS Coverage Table
| REQ | Task(s) | Verification |
|-----|---------|--------------|
| REQ-51-01 (3 classes with ≥10 ORIGIN annotations) | T2.1, T2.2, T2.3 | `grep -c "ORIGIN" src/features/tmux/tmux-{multiplexer,session-manager,grid-planner}.ts` ≥ 10 each |
| REQ-51-02 (integration.ts as factory-of-real-classes) | T3.1 | `grep "setForkSessionManager" src/features/tmux/integration.ts` returns 0 |
| REQ-51-03 (remove fork-bridge.ts + dead test) | T4.1 | `git grep fork-bridge` returns 0 in src/ and tests/ |
| REQ-51-04 (6 BATS, 2 per cluster) | T5.1 | `ls tests/scripts/tmux/ | wc -l` ≥ 3 (multiplexer/, session/, grid/) |
| REQ-51-05 (15+ vitest) | T5.2 | `npx vitest run tests/lib/tmux/ 2>&1 | grep -c "✓"` ≥ 15 |
| REQ-51-06 (D-04 preserved) | T3.1, T7-verify | `grep -A 5 "existsSync.*FORK" src/features/tmux/integration.ts:197-202` matches |
| REQ-51-07 (atomic commit + L1 evidence) | T-final | `git log --oneline -1` shows correct commit; `npm test` all pass |

## Risk Mitigation
[List risks from 49-CLOSE-PIVOT-2026-06-02.md with mitigations]

## Verification Plan (pre-EXECUTE)
[ ] Plan-checker PASS or PASS-WITH-FLAGS
[ ] All 7 EARS mapped to tasks
[ ] DAG is acyclic
[ ] D-04 location preserved
[ ] 8 intentional refs to "opencode-tmux" acceptable (NOT removed; see EXECUTE for verdict)

## Out of Scope

- P52-P55 forward synthesis

- Rewriting `tests/lib/tmux/tmux-copilot.test.ts`
```
